text:
### Application to set aside judgment or order following failure to attend E+W


27.5. —(1) Where a party does not attend a hearing or directions appointment and the court gives judgment or makes an order against him, the party who failed to attend may apply for the judgment or order to be set aside (GL) .


(2) An application under paragraph (1) must be supported by evidence.


(3) Where an application is made under paragraph (1), the court may grant the application only if the applicant—


F10 (4) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . .


Textual Amendments


F10 Rule 27.5(4) omitted (22.4.2014) by virtue of The Family Procedure (Amendment No.3) Rules 2013 (S.I. 2013/3204) , rules 1 , 71 (with rule 137 ); S.I. 2014/954 , art. 2


### Court bundles and place of filing of documents and bundles E+W


27.6. —(1) The provisions of Practice Direction 27A must be followed for the preparation of court bundles and for other related matters in respect of hearings and directions appointments.


F11 (2) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . .
